findings: Commander launch failure is correctly forced to status failed in swarm-state.json with a commander_launch_failed ledger event.
Blocked pre-launch state propagates blocked to run and commander state files, and initial state is starting rather than success.
Gap: non-commander worker launch failure lacks a structured persisted failed artifact; failure may only appear via PID liveness and stdout.
Gap: fleet launched banner prints even when launched count is below requested count, creating an optimistic signal despite partial launch.
